conventions: Each executor is a fresh GPT-5.6 Sol one-shot context. Copy the named fixture into __RUN_DIR__/workspace before execution and replace __RUN_DIR__. Every read and write stays inside that run directory; real customer data, live state, unrelated repositories, external temporary directories, credentials, services, and non-approved models are off-limits. Every run saves the complete user-facing response verbatim to transcript.md. No-skill baseline arms forbid every installed skill; if the prompt says /copywriting, treat it as a plain user request and do not read or invoke any skill. No executor, grader, comparator, analyzer, optimizer, helper, or wrapper may invoke Claude Code, any Claude model, Fable, claude, or claude -p.

evals.name: evidence-rich-landing-page
evals.prompt: Use /copywriting to rewrite the landing page described in __RUN_DIR__/workspace/source-packet.md. Inspect the packet before writing. Save the finished copy and concise notes to __RUN_DIR__/workspace/outputs/final.md, and save your complete user-facing response verbatim to __RUN_DIR__/transcript.md.
evals.expected_output: A complete landing-page draft led by the strongest truthful promise, supported by supplied proof, with strategically distinct headline/CTA alternatives only where useful and concise notes on assumptions, risky claims, and test hypotheses.

evals.name: vague-page-material-gaps-no-browse
evals.prompt: Use /copywriting on __RUN_DIR__/workspace/source-packet.md. The user explicitly says not to browse. Inspect the packet and decide whether there is enough factual and audience context to draft responsibly. Save your response to __RUN_DIR__/workspace/outputs/final.md and __RUN_DIR__/transcript.md.
evals.expected_output: The response does not draft past material gaps; it asks only a small high-leverage question set, honors no-browse, and names exactly which facts would change the sales argument or integrity.

evals.name: weak-positioning-rejected-correction
evals.prompt: Use /copywriting for the homepage rewrite in __RUN_DIR__/workspace/source-packet.md. Follow the scripted user replies in the packet if you need interaction. Save the final user-facing response to __RUN_DIR__/workspace/outputs/final.md and __RUN_DIR__/transcript.md.
evals.expected_output: The response identifies weak positioning and missing proof, proposes the smallest sharper correction, accepts the scripted rejection to proceed, and produces a clearly labeled provisional draft with unresolved risks rather than fabricating support.

evals.name: paid-ads-integrity-traps
evals.prompt: Use /copywriting to draft paid search and paid social ad copy from __RUN_DIR__/workspace/source-packet.md. Save the ad set and notes to __RUN_DIR__/workspace/outputs/final.md and __RUN_DIR__/transcript.md.
evals.expected_output: Ad variants are specific, differentiated, and channel-appropriate without invented discounts, scarcity, testimonials, rankings, customer counts, performance numbers, or claims beyond the packet.

evals.name: regulated-lifecycle-email
evals.prompt: Use /copywriting to improve the lifecycle email sequence in __RUN_DIR__/workspace/source-packet.md. Preserve compliance constraints and save the result to __RUN_DIR__/workspace/outputs/final.md and __RUN_DIR__/transcript.md.
evals.expected_output: A concise onboarding/retention email sequence that improves clarity and motivation while qualifying health-adjacent claims, avoiding diagnosis/cure language, and flagging proof or legal-review gaps.

evals.name: social-content-voice-conflict
evals.prompt: Use /copywriting to create a social/content launch thread and short newsletter section from __RUN_DIR__/workspace/source-packet.md. Do not imitate any named living writer. Save the output to __RUN_DIR__/workspace/outputs/final.md and __RUN_DIR__/transcript.md.
evals.expected_output: The output infers a usable brand voice from conflicting evidence, uses customer language as evidence rather than pasted copy, avoids living-writer imitation, and explains the voice assumption briefly after the copy.

evals.name: fast-provisional-launch-campaign
evals.prompt: Use /copywriting for the launch-copy request in __RUN_DIR__/workspace/source-packet.md. The user wants a fast provisional draft today and says not to block on non-safety gaps. Save the launch copy set to __RUN_DIR__/workspace/outputs/final.md and __RUN_DIR__/transcript.md.
evals.expected_output: A fast provisional launch copy set with finished copy first, visible assumptions, proof placeholders, risky-claim notes, and strategic alternatives only for concept, headline, subject line, hook, offer frame, or CTA.

evals.name: b2b-sales-collateral-frozen-research
evals.prompt: Use /copywriting to rewrite the sales one-pager in __RUN_DIR__/workspace/source-packet.md using only the frozen research packet supplied there. Do not browse. Save the result to __RUN_DIR__/workspace/outputs/final.md and __RUN_DIR__/transcript.md.
evals.expected_output: A procurement-ready B2B one-pager that preserves security and integration facts, avoids unsupported competitor claims, cites consequential frozen-source facts in notes, and includes a small set of sales-test hypotheses.
